name: 02_catan_open_menu
description: Online Catan match (1024x494) with four players (camarasa, Misterchuck, CHERRYNES, syseeker). The yellow hamburger menu icon is in the bottom-left corner. The pipeline should open the in-game menu so the user can save and exit cleanly.
instruction: Open the in-game menu so I can save and exit this match.

context_history.text: I need to step away. We can finish this game tomorrow.
Understood. I will open the menu so you can save and exit on your turn.
